name: War Domain Spells
description: Your connection to this divine domain ensures you always have certain spells ready. When you reach a Cleric level specified in the War Domain Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. War Domain Spells: 3rd – Guiding Bolt, Magic Weapon, Shield of Faith, Spiritual Weapon; 5th – Crusader's Mantle, Spirit Guardians; 7th – Fire Shield, Freedom of Movement; 9th – Hold Monster, Steel Wind Strike.
